infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Math Garden uses the microphone so you can speak your answers.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Math Garden uses speech recognition to understand your spoken math answers.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Math Garden to use the microphone so you can speak your answers.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow Math Garden to recognize your spoken math answers.
